service.description: Check configured SFTP locations for available files and run reconciliation through the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline or the temporary mapping bridge.

parameter.name: ruleSetId
parameter.description: Preferred RuleSet input for the SFTP automation cutover. When present, automation routing uses the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline.

parameter.name: compareScopeId
parameter.description: Optional compare-scope override. Required only when the RuleSet exposes more than one compare scope.

parameter.name: reconciliationMappingId
parameter.description: Legacy mapping bridge input retained temporarily for existing scheduled jobs that have not been migrated yet.

parameter.name: reconciliationRunId
parameter.description: Optional run identifier for logging/context only.

parameter.name: file1SystemEnumId
parameter.description: Optional file 1 system identifier. In RuleSet mode this is used only for file-side validation; in mapping mode it remains required.

parameter.name: file2SystemEnumId
parameter.description: Optional file 2 system identifier. In RuleSet mode this is used only for file-side validation; in mapping mode it remains required.

parameter.name: file1SftpServerId
parameter.description: SftpServer ID for file 1.

parameter.name: file2SftpServerId
parameter.description: SftpServer ID for file 2.

parameter.name: file1FileTypeEnumId
parameter.description: Optional override for file 1 type (DftCsv, DftJson).

parameter.name: file2FileTypeEnumId
parameter.description: Optional override for file 2 type (DftCsv, DftJson).

parameter.name: file1SchemaFileName
parameter.description: Optional override for file 1 JSON schema (required when JSON).

parameter.name: file2SchemaFileName
parameter.description: Optional override for file 2 JSON schema (required when JSON).

parameter.name: file1RemotePath
parameter.description: Remote path for file 1 (required if only referencing a server).

parameter.name: file2RemotePath
parameter.description: Remote path for file 2 (required if only referencing a server).

parameter.name: sftpRunScopeEnumId
parameter.description: Automation SFTP access scope. Use DARPAN_SFTP_TENANT for tenant jobs or DARPAN_SFTP_ADMIN for platform/admin jobs.

parameter.name: runTenantUserGroupId
parameter.description: Tenant user-group id for scheduled tenant jobs. Defaults to the active tenant for authenticated runs.

parameter.name: allowAdminSftp
parameter.description: Explicit opt-in required before an admin/platform SFTP server may be used by an admin-scoped job.

parameter.name: archiveSubdir
parameter.description: Folder name (under the remote/local directory) where consumed files will be moved.

parameter.name: stageLocation
parameter.description: Where staged copies of SFTP files will be written before reconciliation.

parameter.name: pollIntervalMinutes
parameter.description: Retry interval in minutes when an expected SFTP file is not available yet.

parameter.name: pollTimeoutMinutes
parameter.description: Maximum retry window in minutes before reporting that expected SFTP files were not found.

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Override for reconciliation outputs. Defaults to the data-manager reconciliation run folder.

service.description: Run one saved SFTP-file automation, recording execution status and delegating file access to the centralized SFTP poll-and-reconcile service.

parameter.name: automationId
parameter.description: ReconciliationAutomation row to execute. The automation must use AUT_IN_SFTP_FILES and two AUT_SRC_SFTP source rows.

parameter.name: scheduledDate
parameter.description: Scheduled fire time to record on the execution row. Defaults to the current timestamp.

parameter.name: sftpRunScopeEnumId
parameter.description: SFTP access scope passed through to the centralized SFTP guard.

parameter.name: runTenantUserGroupId
parameter.description: Tenant user-group id for tenant-scoped scheduled runs. Defaults to the automation owner tenant.

parameter.name: allowAdminSftp
parameter.description: Explicit opt-in required before an admin-scoped automation may use admin SFTP.

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Override for reconciliation outputs. Defaults to the data-manager reconciliation run folder.

service.description: Execute one automation by resolving its scheduled date window, creating/reusing idempotent child execution rows, extracting source files, and running the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline.

parameter.name: scheduledFireTime
parameter.description: Scheduled fire time used for idempotency. Defaults to the current timestamp for manual runs.

parameter.name: windowStartDate
parameter.description: Required only for AUT_WIN_CUSTOM backfill runs.

parameter.name: windowEndDate
parameter.description: Required only for AUT_WIN_CUSTOM backfill runs.

service.description: Find active automations with nextScheduledFireTime at or before now, call execute#Automation, and advance nextScheduledFireTime from the automation schedule expression.
